'''ât-z-l-l''' ('''katazleloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weigh|weigh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weigh|weigh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-z-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| katazleloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazleloko|thitazleloko]] || [[word:jitazleloko|jitazleloko]] || [[word:shitazleloko|shitazleloko]] || [[word:kitazleloko|kitazleloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazleloko|thuthutazleloko]] || [[word:jujutazleloko|jujutazleloko]] || [[word:shushutazleloko|shushutazleloko]] || [[word:kukutazleloko|kukutazleloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazleloko|thutazleloko]] || [[word:jutazleloko|jutazleloko]] || [[word:shutazleloko|shutazleloko]] || [[word:kutazleloko|kutazleloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazleloko|thotazleloko]] || [[word:jotazleloko|jotazleloko]] || [[word:shotazleloko|shotazleloko]] || [[word:kotazleloko|kotazleloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazleloko|thotazleloko]] || [[word:jotazleloko|jotazleloko]] || [[word:shotazleloko|shotazleloko]] || [[word:kotazleloko|kotazleloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtazleloko|thĂŠtazleloko]] || [[word:jĂŠtazleloko|jĂŠtazleloko]] || [[word:shĂŠtazleloko|shĂŠtazleloko]] || [[word:kĂŠtazleloko|kĂŠtazleloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazleloko|thathatazleloko]] || [[word:jajatazleloko|jajatazleloko]] || [[word:shashatazleloko|shashatazleloko]] || [[word:kakatazleloko|kakatazleloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazleloko|thatazleloko]] || [[word:jatazleloko|jatazleloko]] || [[word:shatazleloko|shatazleloko]] || [[word:katazleloko|katazleloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazleloko|thatazleloko]] || [[word:jatazleloko|jatazleloko]] || [[word:shatazleloko|shatazleloko]] || [[word:katazleloko|katazleloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shatazlelithi|shatazlelithi]] || [[word:shatazleliji|shatazleliji]] || [[word:shatazlelishi|shatazlelishi]] || [[word:shatazleliki|shatazleliki]]
